title: Pale Chinese Currants Noodles
description: A light and refreshing Chinese dish featuring currants and a winey, glassy-jelly sauce, perfect for a keto-friendly meal. This dish is made with a delicate balance of flavors and textures.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the shirataki noodles according to the package instructions.
In a small saucepan, combine the grape wine, xanthan gum, and grated ginger, and whisk until the xanthan gum is dissolved.
Add the sesame oil to the saucepan and whisk until well combined.
Bring the sauce mixture to a simmer over medium heat and cook until it has thickened into a glassy-jelly sauce.
In a large skillet or wok, combine the cooked noodles, currants, and minced garlic, and stir to combine.
Pour the glassy-jelly sauce over the noodle mixture and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has been fully absorbed.
Stir in the chopped green onions and serve immediately.
